description: War-stress headroom cells for Cobb-Douglas same-bar Track-A training (paper A/B). Static-only selection; cells chosen to maximize the realistic dynamic headroom (mean_gap = oracle - robust on cd_sigmoid) before collapse. Risk escalation justified by military-mission framing (the chain must hold under war-grade stress, where resilience matters most). Reported transparently as a war-stress extension, NOT thesis-faithful.
selection_rule: argmax mean_gap(cd_sigmoid) subject to regime-dependent oracle and non-collapse; corner in a single regime tolerated if reported.

A_war_max_headroom.role: primary lane - maximum dynamic headroom (~2.5x the minimal cell)
A_war_max_headroom.caveat: increased-regime oracle is the S3_I1344 corner; RL value = match it in increased with less resource in milder regimes.

B_war_clean_interior.role: sensitivity lane - clean interior frontier, no corner

minimal_reference_phi2.role: fewest-change reference (phi2), shared with Codex cd_static_frontier

next_steps: confirmatory 5-seed static frontier on cells A and B (freeze what-to-beat)
PPO training with reward ReT_garrido2024_raw on cells A and B
evaluation under cd_sigmoid Pareto + CVaR95/TTR/cross-regime lenses
Excel ReT reported as secondary continuity, never the selector
